metadata.app_description: Embr: creator-focused social media and freelance marketplace monorepo. NestJS API (port 3003) + Next.js frontend (port 3004). PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7 via Docker Compose.
metadata.threat_model_summary: Embr handles user PII (email, full name, location), financial data (wallet balances, Stripe Connect IDs, payout history, tip amounts), and user-generated content. Three privilege tiers: anonymous visitors, authenticated users (USER/CREATOR), and privileged staff (MODERATOR/ADMIN). Highest-value targets are auth tokens, creator financial accounts, and admin moderation functions. Most likely attack vectors: XSS-based token exfiltration (mitigated by new CSP), IDOR on financial and appeal endpoints (fixed), privilege escalation through role manipulation (fixed isCreator).
metadata.stop_condition_note: All identified P0/P1/P2 security findings from the previous audit have been remediated in this implementation pass.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Suspension checks added to login(), googleLogin(), and validateUser()
findings.fix_applied: Added `if (user.suspended || (user.suspendedUntil && user.suspendedUntil > new Date()))` check in all three authentication paths.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Refresh tokens now stored as SHA-256 hashes in the database
findings.fix_applied: generateTokens() now stores createHash('sha256').update(token).digest('hex') in the DB. refreshTokens() and logout() hash the incoming token before DB lookup.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Wallet data removed from non-owner profile responses
findings.fix_applied: sanitizeUser() now accepts includeFinancial flag. getProfile() passes true (owner context); getUserByUsername() passes isOwner check.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: isCreator removed from UpdateUserSettingsDto
findings.fix_applied: Removed isCreator field from DTO. Creator status must be assigned via admin endpoint.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Stripe webhook controller decorated with @Public()
findings.fix_applied: Added @Public() class decorator. Webhook already verifies Stripe signature via stripe.webhooks.constructEvent.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Tip endpoints restricted to resource owners
findings.fix_applied: getTipsReceivedByUser() now checks req.user.id === userId. getTipsByPost() now uses req.user.id as the caller context.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Hardcoded 'dev-secret' removed from notifications module
findings.fix_applied: Replaced JwtModule.register({secret: ... || 'dev-secret'}) with JwtModule.registerAsync using ConfigService. Throws if JWT_SECRET is not set.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: changePassword and verifyEmail set tokens as httpOnly cookies
findings.fix_applied: Both handlers now accept @Res() and set tokens via res.cookie() with httpOnly=true, then return only user data in the JSON body.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: localStorage token references removed from web client
findings.fix_applied: Removed clearAuthStorage() helper that called localStorage.removeItem() for token keys.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Token lookups scoped to userId via prefixed token format
findings.fix_applied: Tokens are now generated as userId.randomHex. resetPassword() and verifyEmail() extract userId prefix and scope DB lookups to that user.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: CORS throws in production if ALLOWED_ORIGINS is unset
findings.fix_applied: Added startup check: if NODE_ENV=production and ALLOWED_ORIGINS is unset, throws Error rather than falling back to localhost.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Restriction status endpoint restricted to owner or admin/moderator
findings.fix_applied: checkUserRestriction() now checks req.user.id === userId || role is ADMIN/MODERATOR, throws ForbiddenException otherwise.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Appeal IDOR fixed: ownership check added
findings.fix_applied: getAppealById() now verifies appeal.userId === req.user.id or role is ADMIN/MODERATOR before returning the appeal.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Actual Redis password removed from apps/api/.env.example

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Auth cookies now use sameSite=strict and COOKIE_SECURE env var
findings.fix_applied: Changed sameSite from 'lax' to 'strict'. Changed secure from NODE_ENV=production check to process.env.COOKIE_SECURE === 'true'. Added COOKIE_SECURE=false to .env.example.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: ENABLE_DETAILED_ERRORS and ENABLE_SWAGGER default to false in .env.example
findings.fix_applied: Changed ENABLE_SWAGGER, ENABLE_REQUEST_LOGGING, and ENABLE_DETAILED_ERRORS defaults to false in .env.example.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: Content-Security-Policy and HSTS headers added to Next.js
findings.fix_applied: Added CSP header restricting script-src, connect-src, frame-src. Added Strict-Transport-Security header. Removed deprecated X-XSS-Protection.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: FRONTEND_URL validated before OAuth redirect
findings.fix_applied: googleAuthCallback() now checks that FRONTEND_URL is set and returns 500 if not, preventing open redirect potential.

findings.label: resolved
findings.title: paymentIntentId removed from sessionStorage
findings.fix_applied: Removed sessionStorage.setItem('paymentIntentId', ...) calls. State is managed in React component state only.
